source_pr.title: ddl, parser: implement the normal flow of distributed processing in DDL reorg phase for adding index
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/37125

Problem Summary:

-  Add `startDispatchBackfillJobsLoop` to support distributed processing like dispatch DDL job Loop.

- If `bJob.Meta.ReorgTp == model.ReorgTypeLitMerge`, we will do `runBackfillJobsWithLightning`; otherwise we will do `runBackfillJobs`

- use `doReorgWorkForCreateIndexWithDistReorg` instead of `oReorgWorkForCreateIndex` when dist-reorg is enabled.

- add a `batchGet` to `backfillCtxPool`

Simple process:
```
DDL Owner --> doReorgWorkForCreateIndexWithDistReorg --> controlWritePhysicalTableRecord
                                                                            ||
                                                 splitTableToBackfillJobs --> check backfill jobs are finished
                                                        ||
                                              add backfill jobs to table

All TiDB ---> startDispatchBackfillJobsLoop --> runBackfillJobsWithLightning --> handle LitBackCtxMgr(include Register and Unregister)
                                            --> runBackfillJobs(txn-merge) --> GetTasks --> bfWorker.runTask
                                                        ||                                        ||
                                              get backfill jobs from table      update backfill jobs from table
```

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```
